mapper.sql: id, refund_id, refund_sn, operation_type, operator_id, operator_name, operation_result, result_message, process_time_ms, third_party_response, created_time, note
mapper.insert: insert into oms_refund_process_log ( refund_id, refund_sn, operation_type, operator_id, operator_name, operation_result, result_message, process_time_ms, third_party_response, created_time, note ) values ( #{refundId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{refundSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processTimeMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{thirdPartyResponse,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select from oms_refund_process_log where refund_id = #{refundId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by created_time desc
select from oms_refund_process_log where refund_sn = #{refundSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by created_time desc
select from oms_refund_process_log where operation_type = #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by created_time desc
select from oms_refund_process_log where operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by created_time desc
select COALESCE(avg(process_time_ms), 0) from oms_refund_process_log where operation_type = #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and process_time_ms > 0
mapper.insert:
insert into oms_refund_process_log ( refund_id, refund_sn, operation_type, operator_id, operator_name, operation_result, result_message, process_time_ms, third_party_response, created_time, note ) values
( #{item.refundId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.refundSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operationResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resultMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.processTimeMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.thirdPartyResponse,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.note,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
